title: CompetencyAssessment
description: An assessment of a person against a competency. Carries the two individual dimensions — proficiency (0-5) and AI enablement — which are independent: how well someone performs a competency vs. how much AI is woven into how they perform it. Used inline on a 'has_competency' relation, or promoted to a standalone node when it needs its own id and provenance. When used as a node, set 'id', 'person' and 'competency'.

id.description: Optional assessment identifier (node form only). Grammar: 'assessment:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-].

person.description: Person node id being assessed (node form only)

competency.description: Competency node id being assessed (node form only)

proficiency.description: Individual proficiency level on the 0-5 scale (0 = none, 5 = expert). See dimensions.md for scale criteria.

aiEnablement.description: How AI is woven into the way the person performs this competency; independent of proficiency

assessedOn.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the assessment was made

assessor.description: Who performed the assessment (person id, team, or 'self')

notes.description: Optional free-form notes about the assessment
